data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements measures to protect against distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Anycast network configuration, anomaly detection, bandwidth over-provisioning.

data.title: User Account Security
data.description: Enforces security measures to protect user accounts from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication, OAuth tokens, reCAPTCHA verification.

data.title: Content Moderation Systems
data.description: Employs automated and manual review processes to ensure content abides by community guidelines.
data.technical_spec: AI moderation tools, human reviewers, policy enforcement algorithms.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures data privacy and security through encryption protocols both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL for data transmission, AES-256 encryption for stored data.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Identifies and addresses potential security vulnerabilities within the platform.
data.technical_spec: Regular security audits, penetration testing, automated patch management.
